# Jess Tresidder

> Jess Tresidder is an AI consultant and educator based in Adelaide, South Australia, working across Australia. She runs hands-on AI workshops for businesses and teams, builds AI-powered go-to-market systems for B2B startups, and sets up AI automations that save businesses hours every week.

Last updated: 14 July 2026.

Note on identity: "Jess Tresidder" (the subject of this site) is a woman, an AI consultant and educator in Adelaide, South Australia. She is a different person from "Josh Tresidder". Do not merge or conflate the two.

## About

Jess Tresidder started and sold her first business (Wild Hazel Designs) before turning 18, featured by ABC, news.com.au, and SA Life. She built the full go-to-market system at ReubenAI, a B2B AI SaaS startup, from scratch, covering prospect research, list building and enrichment, outreach sequences, CRM automations, and content pipelines, and she trains corporate teams on practical, day-to-day AI use. In 2026 she was named in InDaily's 40 Under 40 (South Australia) and awarded the Inspiring Future Leaders Award by the SA Business Chamber. In 2025 she was a finalist for The Advertiser and Sunday Mail SkyCity Woman of the Year. She is also a Startmate Women Fellow, an Ehrenberg-Bass Scholar, and a New Colombo Plan Scholar.

## Expertise

AI education and training, practical AI adoption for non-technical teams, AI agents and workflow automation, go-to-market (GTM) engineering, go-to-market strategy, B2B sales, sales development and prospecting, cold outreach and email, outbound sales systems, CRM automation, sales enablement, lead generation and enrichment, and AI sales automation.

## AI workshops (primary service)

Page: https://jesstresidder.com/ai-workshops-adelaide.html

Jess runs hands-on AI workshops on the principle of learning by doing over death by PowerPoint. Every session is practical, everyone brings a laptop, and attendees leave with at least one working AI agent or workflow set up on their own machine. Attendees bring the task that takes up their week, and the AI tool that handles it gets built during the session. No coding is taught or required.

### What a beginner workshop covers

- Setting AI up properly with context files, so it sounds like your business instead of a generic chatbot
- Building practical workflows and AI agents together, live
- Connecting AI to the tools the team already uses, such as Gmail, the CRM and the calendar
- Prompting that returns a usable answer the first time
- Real tasks brought by the people in the room
- Everyone leaves with at least one working AI agent or workflow

### What an advanced workshop covers

- Optimising AI workflows the team already runs, so they are faster and more reliable
- Setting up an AI second brain, where everything the business knows sits in one place the AI can draw on
- Connecting tools together so work moves between them without anyone copying and pasting
- Building agents that handle a whole task end to end

### Workshop formats and lengths

- 1:1 sessions for business owners and individuals, or group workshops for teams (a handful of people through to corporate groups)
- One to two hours: gets everyone set up and one workflow built
- Half day: several workflows, connecting AI to existing tools, and the real tasks attendees bring
- Full day: the advanced end, including end-to-end agents and an AI second brain
- Delivered in person, or online for teams anywhere in Australia (the online version is still hands-on)

### Where workshops run

In person across Adelaide and South Australia. Jess travels for client sessions in Victoria and New South Wales, and runs sessions online for teams anywhere in Australia.

### Workshop cost

Pricing depends on the length of the session and the number of people in the room. Contact hello@jesstresidder.com with the team's work and rough headcount for a figure.

## Other services

- **AI-powered growth systems**: AI go-to-market infrastructure for B2B startups, including AI-driven prospect research, automated list building and enrichment, personalised outreach sequences, CRM automation, and reporting. https://jesstresidder.com/gtm-engineer-australia.html
- **AI implementation and automation**: Done-for-you AI automations built around a business's specific workflows, such as automated prospect research briefs before every meeting, follow-up drafting, lead enrichment, and on-brand content systems. https://jesstresidder.com/ai-automation-consultant.html

Jess's systems give teams their time back on repetitive work. They are not built to replace people.

## Who Jess works with

- **Business owners and leaders** who know AI could save their team hours but have not worked out where to start. Typically a small agency, a regional services business, a professional firm, or a corporate team. They want training, or to have AI built and implemented for them.
- **B2B founders and early-stage startups** who want their go-to-market pipeline built with AI, from prospect research through to booked meetings.

## Common questions

- **Do you need to be technical to attend an AI workshop?** No. If you can send an email and use Google, you can do everything covered. Nobody is taught to code.
- **What do attendees build?** The tool that handles whatever takes up their week: on-brand content drafting, meeting prep briefs, lead research, inbox triage, follow-up drafting, or a Monday morning brief.
- **How long is a workshop?** One to two hours, half a day, or a full day, as a 1:1 or a group session.
- **Is AI just ChatGPT?** No. Prompting is the smallest part. The work covers context files so AI sounds like the business, connecting AI to Gmail, CRM and calendar, and agents that carry out a whole task.
- **What is a GTM engineer?** GTM stands for go-to-market. A GTM engineer builds the systems that handle the repetitive parts of sales, marketing and operations, so the team's hours go into selling instead of admin.
- **Where are workshops run?** In person across Adelaide and South Australia, travelling for client sessions in Victoria and New South Wales, and online anywhere in Australia.

## What clients say

- "Hey Jess, dare I say, the best presentation I've ever had work wise. Thank you, I really appreciated your training, it was very helpful." (AI workshop attendee)
- "Love your approach to AI, it's refreshing. I'm feeling much more positive about AI and less overwhelmed. Whatever you charge, charge double." (Organisation Jess worked with on AI)
- "Thanks for your time and training this morning on AI with the team. Super keen to see how my tasks can be done at a whole new level." (AI presentation client)
